productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Leatherette  Green Handbags
description: Created for the woman of sophistication, this handbag from spice art is crafted from the finest material and in fashionable designs to give you that stylish edge. Made of synthetic leather in turtle shell pattern and is ruched near the mouth Wide handles with rose embellishments on the front One main zippered compartment with a mobile pouch and a zippered pouch inside One pouch at the back with a magnetic button closure Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dirt
